Name: ENEMY_SHOT_SFX_PARAM
Description: Defines the special effects (SFX) used when an enemy performs a projectile or shooting action, including the effect ID and its spawn location reference.

Fields.Name: SFX ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the visual effect triggered when the enemy fires a shot.

Fields.Name: Spawn Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: ID of the dummy polygon used as the emission or spawn point for the shot SFX.
